# Empowering Indoor Farming with Smart Technology
Welcome to Greeny Solutions — your go-to partner for smart indoor farming solutions. Indoor farming has never been easier with our AI farming system and IoT farming tools. Our platform empowers growers with automated greenhouse controls, real-time insights, and a full suite of precision agriculture features.
[ Get In touch ](https://greeny-solutions.com/contact-us/)
[ Learn More ](https://greeny-solutions.com/our-solution/)
###### Why Greeny Solutions?
## Greeny Solutions is your Trusted Partner
Indoor farming has never been easier thanks to our AI-powered system and IoT tools. Our platform provides growers with automated greenhouse controls, real-time insights, and a complete range of precision agriculture features.
**AI-Based Farming System:** Make smarter decisions with real-time analytics.
**IoT-Compatible Hardware:** Monitor and control every detail of your environment.
**Sustainable Agricultural Technologies:** Reduce waste, optimize water usage, and increase crop yields.
[ explore our system ](https://greeny-solutions.com/?page_id=7458)
![](https://greeny-solutions.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/05/Automation-in-harvesting-and-processing-of-hydroponic-crops.jpg)
###### What do we offer
## Greeny Solutions offers an AI-Powered Solution
Qui optimise chaque aspect de l’agriculture en intérieur, répondant aux principaux défis rencontrés par les agriculteurs. Le système offre :
Automation of Routine Tasks
Streamlines essential farming operations such as nutrient delivery, climate regulation, and irrigation...
Environmental Monitoring
Tracks water quality, environmental conditions, and plant health to ensure optimal growth conditions.
Disease Detection
Utilizes AI to identify and prevent the spread of plant diseases early, minimizing losses.
Data Analytics
Provides actionable insights through advanced data analysis to improve resource efficiency, crop yield, and overall farm management.
![](https://greeny-solutions.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/Pitch_Deck_GreenySolutions_2026.jpg)
[ The Hardware ](https://greeny-solutions.com/notre-solution/the-hardware/)
[ The Software ](https://greeny-solutions.com/notre-solution/the-software/)
## Our Partners

![](https://greeny-solutions.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/EuE_logo.jpg)
## Key Benefits
Increased Profitability
Optimized workflows and automated controls reduce labor and resource costs.
Water Base
Efficient water management ensures sustainability by using up to 90% less water.
3-4X Faster
Accelerated growth cycles through precise environmental control enable crops to mature 3-4 times faster .
30% MORE YIELD
AI-driven optimization and nutrient control increase crop productivity by 30%.
## Precision Control for Yield Growth and Efficiency
Obtenez des rendements supérieurs et une efficacité accrue grâce à un contrôle précis. Optimisez chaque aspect de votre culture, du climat à l’apport en nutriments, grâce à des systèmes automatisés qui réagissent aux données en temps réel. Maximisez votre productivité, réduisez le gaspillage et produisez des récoltes de qualité supérieure de façon constante avec un minimum d’effort.
[ Discover more ](https://greeny-solutions.com/)

tavily.answer: Greeny Solutions is a startup focused on smart indoor farming, headquartered in Tunisia, with technology and services in AI and IoT. It has received funding and is part of the French Tech community. The company's main products include AI-powered farming systems and IoT tools.
